## What changed

Describe the focused change and its user or developer impact.

## Security and compatibility

- [ ] I did not add secrets, personal/customer data, or generated binaries.
- [ ] New dependencies and copied material have compatible licenses and notices.
- [ ] Core remains lightweight; optional enterprise behavior stays modular.
- [ ] Public behavior works on the platforms affected by this change.

## Verification

- [ ] `./scripts/verify.sh`
- [ ] `./scripts/native-test.sh` when native packaging is affected
- [ ] Documentation updated in English and Chinese when needed
